name: Flowermate Aura Vaporizer
summary: A lightweight, affordable portable for dry herb, oil and concentrate, for patients who want a versatile starter device that won't cost much.
description: The Flowermate Aura is a compact, plastic-bodied vaporiser that handles dry herb, oils and concentrates with a swappable capsule, which makes it unusually versatile for the money. A ceramic chamber and wide 40-230C range give you room to dial in your dose, with a fast 10-30 second heat-up and a battery that lasts well for the size. At well under the price of a full-size portable, it's an honest entry point. For a UK patient testing the water or wanting a cheap second device, the Aura does a lot — just accept the plastic build is a trade-off for the price. Two-year warranty.
